free_text: Recent research in neutron dosimetry and damage
analysis for materials irradiations.
Rotating Target Neutron Source II.
RTNS-II contains two accelerator-based neutron
sources which use the T(d,n)4He reaction.
All samples counted at least twice at different
decay times to confirm data. In the case of
multiple gamma rays, the results were averaged.
All half-lives and branching ratios taken from
D.Kocher, DOE/TIC-111026 (1981).
Corrected for absorption, finite solid angles, and
room-return effects.
Relative accuracy
From Tbl. 1 of ASTM-STP-956,743,1987
L.R.Greenwood, 1986/10/13.
reference update
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
corrected according to last EXFOR rules and Dict.
BIB update. In Subent 3 CRITIQUE was added.
SD: REACTION code corrected in Subent 3.
OS. Minor correction in MONITOR
SD: CRITIQUE was added. (From  E.Dupont
(2009.08.31): ~2 times too low. However, these values
are consistent with ground state production.
SD: SF4=Sc-44 -> Sc-44-g; SF5=(M) added in
REACTION code (approved with L.Greenwood 2012-11-06).
CRITIQUE deleted.
Data value updated
includes all decay by isomeric transition from
metastable state.
